form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr6) over 1609m after showing early speed and racing wide at Menangle, at the bell was 3rd-4.19 beaten 10 m by Hugo Maguire (1:51.30) in No NR on March 27 at $3.80. Before that, a solid effort when 2nd (Fr7) over 1609m after showing early speed at Menangle was 3rd-4.6 at the bell, beaten a nose by Dance With Carmer (1:51.90) in NR up to 85 on March 21 at $2.50. Well placed and the ace draw can see him break through.
